summary: The Gradle build failed because the projectHealth check detected a dependency configuration that must be changed from api to implementation in platform-base's build.gradle.kts.
root_cause: The ':platform-base:projectHealth' task failed due to an existing dependency that should be changed from api to implementation: implementation(projects.domainObjectCollections) (was api) in /home/runner/work/gradle/gradle/platforms/software/platform-base/build.gradle.kts.

suggested_fix: In /home/runner/work/gradle/gradle/platforms/software/platform-base/build.gradle.kts change the dependency declaration from api(projects.domainObjectCollections) to implementation(projects.domainObjectCollections), then re-run the Gradle sanityCheck (or :platform-base:projectHealth) to verify the projectHealth check passes.
